image.alt: Painted portrait of a Russian empress in an elaborate crown and formal gown

rounds.revealFact: Catherine the Great ruled the Russian Empire for over three decades, expanding its territory and influence.

clues: Spanish conquistadors and their allies besieged an island capital city.
Marked the end of the Aztec Empire in 1521.

events.label: Much of Rome burns during the reign of Emperor Nero
The Council of Nicaea establishes core Christian doctrine
The Byzantine Empire reaches its greatest extent under Justinian I
Genghis Khan unites the Mongol tribes under his rule

rounds.prompt: The last Western Roman emperor, Romulus Augustulus, is deposed.
rounds.revealFact: This event is traditionally used to mark the fall of the Western Roman Empire and the start of the medieval period in Europe.

rounds.revealFact: Carved directly into rose-colored sandstone cliffs, Petra was the capital of the Nabataean kingdom in present-day Jordan.
